ValidationRule.description: Enforces the HoldCo → Agency → Advertiser hierarchy. HoldCo accounts must have no parent. Agency parent must be a HoldCo. Advertiser parent must be an Agency.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "HoldCo", NOT(ISBLANK(ParentId)) ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Agency", NOT(ISBLANK(ParentId)), Parent.RecordType.DeveloperName != "HoldCo" ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Advertiser", NOT(ISBLANK(ParentId)), Parent.RecordType.DeveloperName != "Agency" ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid parent hierarchy. HoldCo accounts cannot have a parent. Agency accounts must report to a HoldCo. Advertiser accounts must report to an Agency.
